title: Language Change - "Later" button
scenario: Tapping "Later" on firmware update prompt after changing device language in Poly Studio Mobile app dismisses language list without applying the new language
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Navigate to the Language option under Device Settings.
Select a new language from the language list.
When the firmware update prompt appears, tap the "Later" button.
expected: The language list is dismissed, the current language remains unchanged, and the new language is not applied.
